title: Sons of Horus
name: Sons of Horus
specialty: Assaut combiné d'élite, tactiques de guérilla, commandement
lore: Originally the Luna Wolves, the XVIth Legion was the instrument of the Warmaster and the first among equals during the Great Crusade. They were renamed the Sons of Horus after Ullanor.
When their primarch fell to Chaos they followed him without question. They bled the Imperium at Isstvan, on the route to Terra, and at the final Siege itself. The Legion died when Horus died.
In the aftermath, the broken survivors were reformed by Abaddon into the Black Legion — casting aside Horus' armour-markings and livery and turning their faces to the Long War.
